ns0:entry.ns0:title: BLAKE3-team/BLAKE3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BLAKE3-team/BLAKE3
Language: assembly
the official Rust and C implementations of the BLAKE3 cryptographic hash function

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Rangi42/polishedcrystal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

An upgrade to Pokémon Crystal. Brings features and content up to date, and adds some original content.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RibShark/OmniDrive
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RibShark/OmniDrive
Language: assembly

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aws/aws-lc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aws/aws-lc
Language: assembly
AWS-LC is a general-purpose cryptographic library maintained by the AWS Cryptography team for AWS and their customers. It іs based on code from the Google BoringSSL project and the OpenSSL project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bird-sanctuary/bluejay
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bird-sanctuary/bluejay
Language: assembly
🐦 Digital ESC firmware for controlling brushless motors in multirotors

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bluewaysw/pcgeos
Language: assembly
#FreeGEOS source codes. The offical home of the PC/GEOS operating system technology. For personal computing fans. For all developers and assembly lovers. For YOU!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: leachim6/hello-world
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/leachim6/hello-world
Language: assembly
Hello world in every computer language. Thanks to everyone who contributes to this, make sure to see contributing.md for contribution instructions!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: livekit/rust-sdks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/livekit/rust-sdks
Language: assembly
LiveKit realtime and server SDKs for Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openhwgroup/cva6
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openhwgroup/cva6
Language: assembly
The CORE-V CVA6 is a highly configurable, 6-stage RISC-V core for both application and embedded applications. Application class configurations are capable of booting Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pq-code-package/mlkem-native
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pq-code-package/mlkem-native
Language: assembly
Secure, fast, and portable C90 implementation of ML-KEM / FIPS 203

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pret/pokered
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pret/pokered
Language: assembly

ns0:entry.ns0:title: riscv/riscv-arch-test
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/riscv/riscv-arch-test
Language: assembly
The RISC-V Architectural Certification Tests (ACTs) are a set of assembly language tests designed to certify that a design faithfully implements the RISC-V specification.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: slothy-optimizer/slothy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/slothy-optimizer/slothy
Language: assembly
Assembly super-optimization via constraint solving

ns0:entry.ns0:title: z88dk/z88dk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/z88dk/z88dk
Language: assembly
The development kit for over a hundred z80 family machines - c compiler, assembler, linker, libraries.
